juvionhub.title: JuvionHub
juvionhub.description: A high-performance micro-SaaS platform for selling and consuming online courses. It features a member area, optimized video player, and integrated checkout.
juvionhub.contribution1: Complete front-end architecture using Next.js (App Router) and React.
juvionhub.contribution2: Ultra-responsive members area with high-performance navigation.
juvionhub.contribution3: Integration of a custom video player with dynamic progress tracking.
juvionhub.contribution4: Structured database tables for progress and users in Supabase.
juvionhub.impact: Deepened my knowledge of server-side data caching strategies in Next.js, secure relational database modeling in Supabase, and mobile video rendering optimization.

juvionstudio.title: JuvionStudio.com
juvionstudio.description: The very site you are browsing right now. A technical showcase translating conceptual design into clean, performant, and interactive front-end engineering.
juvionstudio.contribution1: Conceptual visual design focused on editorial typography and brutalist aesthetics.
juvionstudio.contribution2: Complete development utilizing Tailwind CSS v4 and Next.js.
juvionstudio.contribution3: Fluid interactions using Framer Motion and smooth inertial scrolling via Lenis.
juvionstudio.contribution4: Setup of the native multi-language system and high-performance structured SEO.
juvionstudio.impact: Consolidated the use of Tailwind v4 (pure CSS + modern directives) and the perfect synchronization of complex scroll-based animations.

lacrei_saude.title: Lacrei Saúde Rebranding
lacrei_saude.description: Complete refactoring and visual redesign of the medical platform, prioritizing state-of-the-art accessibility (WCAG AA/AAA) and a unified design system for the LGBTQIA+ community.
lacrei_saude.contribution2: Reviewed and refactored color contrast and typographic legibility under WCAG guidelines.
lacrei_saude.contribution3: Developed complex scheduling flows for medical appointments and specialist filters.
lacrei_saude.contribution4: Reduced page load time by 40% through aggressive code-splitting.
lacrei_saude.impact: Gained deep expertise in practical digital accessibility (WAI-ARIA, screen reader testing), scheduling flows, and designing inclusive systems.

About.title: About
About.description1: I am Joel Medina, Front-End Engineer and Web Designer. I work in a highly optimized, AI-assisted way, allowing me to deliver high-complexity projects up to 50% faster — with production-ready delivery timelines in less than a week.
About.description2: As proof of this speed and precision: the JuvionHub platform development was completed in just 3 days, this interactive JuvionStudio portfolio in 2 days, and the technical rebranding of Lacrei Saúde in only 1 day.
About.description3: I use Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS orchestrated with Supabase databases and Vercel deployments to deliver flawless digital products. More than writing code, I build web experiences where every pixel has an exact purpose and every animation carries a clear intent.
About.imageAlt: Portrait of Joel Medina, Front-End Engineer and Web Designer

item1.title: Front-End Engineering
item1.description: Development of robust and scalable interfaces using the best practices of the React ecosystem. Focus on componentization, global state, and clean architecture.

item2.title: Premium Web Design
item2.description: Creation of immersive visual identities and brutalist interfaces. Every design decision is made to generate emotional impact and clarity of use.

item3.title: Animations & Micro-interactions
item3.description: Choreographed movements that bring the interface to life. Advanced use of animation libraries to ensure constant 60fps without performance bottlenecks.
item3.tags: Framer Motion, GSAP, Lenis, CSS Animations

item4.title: Performance & SEO
item4.description: Auditing and refactoring codebases to achieve the maximum in Core Web Vitals. Optimized images, lazy loading, and aggressive bundle size reduction.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Ready to elevate your brand's digital presence to elite design standards? Schedule a chat and let's build the future.
